MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Iluminada Mea, is present.
Attorney, Cyndi Wong, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Delmi Granados and Jared Stein, are present.
Attorney, Rebecca Louie , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
